mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_ministry_dept
AND dept_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_ministry_schedule s LEFT JOIN erp_ministry_dept d ON s.dept_id = d.dept_id
AND (s.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR d.dept_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_ministry_volunteer v LEFT JOIN erp_ministry_dept d ON v.dept_id = d.dept_id
AND (v.member_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR d.dept_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_ministry_report r LEFT JOIN erp_ministry_dept d ON r.dept_id = d.dept_id
AND (r.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR r.author_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
